confidence_certified_routing_policy.route_rule: SLM if score <= 0.0000; HYBRID_ABSTAIN if 0.0000 < score < 0.0100; BASELINE otherwise.
confidence_certified_routing_policy.route_rule_with_abstention: SLM if score <= 0.0000; HYBRID_ABSTAIN if 0.0000 < score < 0.0100; BASELINE otherwise.

confidence_certified_routing_policy.route_rule_with_abstention: SLM if score <= 0.2162; HYBRID_ABSTAIN if 0.2162 < score < 0.3664; BASELINE otherwise.

confidence_certified_routing_policy.route_rule_with_abstention: SLM if score <= 0.1875; HYBRID_ABSTAIN if 0.1875 < score < 0.1875; BASELINE otherwise.
